PowerShell($deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(150\); do { Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:9001/api/v1/analyses" -TimeoutSec 5 } catch { $r = @\(\) }; $done = $false; foreach \($a in $r\) { if \($a.id -eq 1\) { $done = $true } } } until \($done -or \(Get-Date\) -gt $deadline\); if \($done\) { "quick analysis stored" } else { "timeout waiting" })

PowerShell($deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(120\); do { Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:9001/api/v1/analyses/1" -TimeoutSec 5 } catch { $r = $null }; $done = \($null -ne $r\) -and \($null -ne $r.swot_analysis\) } until \($done -or \(Get-Date\) -gt $deadline\); if \($done\) { "extended done"; $r.go_to_market.partnership_targets | ConvertTo-Json; $r.bangladesh_impact | Select-Object -Property impact_score | ConvertTo-Json } else { "timeout" })
